RF ONLINE NEXT Strategy Guide

Comprehensive analysis of 3 races, 6 classes, mecha warfare & farming economy — conquer planet Novus

Get Started Classes

Game Overview

A sci-fi MMORPG masterpiece built with Unreal Engine 5 by Netmarble

54+
Countries
20 Million
Players
3
Factions
6
Bio Suits
4000 Years
Years of Lore

Three Races, Millennia of War

In a sci-fi universe spanning 4000 years, three races on planet Novus — Bellato, Accretia, and Cora — wage endless war for dominance and Holystone energy. Become a Scion, descendant of the ancient Arcane, and join this epic interstellar conflict.

  • Bellato — Human descendants, masters of mecha tech & balanced tactics
  • Accretia — Mechanized race with devastating firepower & defense
  • Cora — Mystical race wielding arcane energy & summoned creatures
Learn About Races →

Core Features

Core System

Bio Suit Free Class Change

Freely switch between six unique classes via Bio Suits. Equipment and skill progression are retained, allowing you to adapt your playstyle to any situation without re-leveling.

Ultimate Weapon

Three Ultimate Weapons

MAU Armor, Launcher, Animus — each ultimate weapon possesses overwhelming power to turn the tide of battle and dominate the battlefield.

PVP Core

Massive Faction Warfare

Epic PVP battles as three races fight for Holystone Mines. Hundreds of players, mecha charges, ultimate weapon duels — a true sci-fi battlefield experience.

Strategy Navigation

Quickly find the guides you need

Farming Guide

Latest News

20
2025.03

RF ONLINE NEXT Global Launch

Netmarble's sci-fi MMORPG RF ONLINE NEXT launched globally on March 20, 2025, supporting cross-play across PC and mobile, built with Unreal Engine 5.

30
2025.09

Taiwan Server Opens

RF ONLINE NEXT Taiwan server officially opened on September 30, 2025, offering smoother experience and localized services for Chinese-speaking players.

01
2025.11

v1.2.1 Update — Bio Suit Balance Adjustments

Major balance adjustments for Punisher and Ghost Bio Suits, increased Mine War rewards, and new limited-time event dungeons.
